'''Silya Darklighter''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and the wife of [[Jula Darklighter]], the sister-in-law of [[Huff Darklighter]] and the mother of [[Rasca Darklighter|Rasca]], [[Gavin Darklighter|Gavin]] and [[Anya Darklighter]]. She and her husband purchased the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars moisture farm]] from [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] after he left the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Bacta" />

{{Char-stub}}
